mapper.select: select tt.topic_name from fr_special fsl left join tb_topic tt on fsl.topic_id = tt.topic_id where special_id = #{specialId}
mapper.sql:
select ti.thumb_url, ti.image_name fileName, ti.image_path, ti.format, ti.width, ti.height, ti.resolution_x, ti.resolution_y, ti.source_lens, ti.image_id, ti.image_name, ti.group_code, ti.wax_code, ti.animal_code, ti.sex_flag gender_flag, ti.topic_name, su.user_name createUser, fs.create_time, fs.description, fs.slide_id, fs.viewers from fr_slide fs left join tb_image ti on fs.image_id = ti.image_id left join sys_user su on fs.create_by = su.user_id
fs.special_id = #{params.projectId} and fs.del_flag='0'
and ti.image_name like concat('%',#{params.fileName},'%')
and ti.animal_code like concat('%',#{params.animalCode},'%')
and fs.description like concat('%',#{params.description},'%')
and ti.sex_flag = #{params.genderFlag}
and JSON_CONTAINS(fs.viewers, ${params.currentUserId}, '$')
and not JSON_CONTAINS(fs.viewers, ${params.currentUserId}, '$')
and ti.group_code = #{params.groupCode}
and ti.wax_code = #{params.waxCode}
and su.user_name like concat('%',#{params.createBy},'%')
AND date_format(fs.create_time,'%Y%m%d') >= date_format(#{params.createTimeParams.beginTime},'%Y%m%d')
AND date_format(fs.create_time,'%Y%m%d') <= date_format(#{params.createTimeParams.endTime},'%Y%m%d')
order by ${params.sortField} ${params.sortType}
order by ti.animal_code asc,ti.wax_code asc,ti.group_code asc,ti.sex_flag asc
mapper.select: select ti.thumb_url, ti.image_name fileName, ti.group_code, ti.wax_code, ti.animal_code, ti.sex_flag gender_flag, su.user_name createUser, fs.create_time, fs.description, fs.slide_id from fr_slide fs left join tb_image ti on fs.image_id = ti.image_id left join sys_user su on fs.create_by = su.user_id where fs.slide_id = #{slideId}

select fs.slide_id,t2.wax_code from fr_slide fs left join fr_special fsl on fs.special_id = fsl.special_id left join tb_image t2 on fs.image_id = t2.image_id where fsl.topic_id= #{topicId} and fsl.species_id= #{speciesId} and fsl.del_flag='0'

select s.slide_id, s.special_id, s.image_id, m.group_code, m.wax_code, m.animal_code, m.sex_flag as gender, s.description, s.del_flag, s.create_by, s.create_time, s.update_by, s.update_time, m.image_id, m.thumb_url, m.image_path, m.format, m.width, m.height, m.resolution_x, m.resolution_y, m.source_lens, m.image_path, m.thumb_url, m.image_name, s.viewers from fr_slide s left join tb_image m on m.image_id = s.image_id
s.slide_id = #{slideId, jdbcType=NUMERIC}
